extends.description:
List of configuration files to inherit from. Supports local paths and
remote Git repositories (`github:<owner>/<repo>@<ref>`).

defaults.description: Default settings applied when no rule matches.

rules.description: Ordered list of permission rules evaluated against each command.

definitions.description: Reusable definitions for paths, sandbox presets, wrappers, and commands.

Defaults.description: Default settings applied when no rule matches a command.

action.description: Default action when no rule matches: `allow`, `deny`, or `ask`.

sandbox.description: Default sandbox preset name to apply.

RuleEntry.description: A permission rule entry. Exactly one of `deny`, `allow`, or `ask` must be set.

deny.description: Command pattern to deny. Matched commands are rejected.

when.description: CEL expression that must evaluate to true for this rule to apply.

message.description: Message shown when the rule matches (primarily for deny rules).

fix_suggestion.description: Suggested fix command shown when a deny rule matches.

allow.description: Command pattern to allow. Matched commands are permitted.

when.description: CEL expression that must evaluate to true for this rule to apply.

message.description: Message shown when the rule matches (primarily for deny rules).

fix_suggestion.description: Suggested fix command shown when a deny rule matches.

sandbox.description: Sandbox preset name to apply when this rule matches (not allowed for deny rules).

ask.description: Command pattern to ask about. Matched commands prompt for confirmation.

when.description: CEL expression that must evaluate to true for this rule to apply.

message.description: Message shown when the rule matches (primarily for deny rules).

fix_suggestion.description: Suggested fix command shown when a deny rule matches.

sandbox.description: Sandbox preset name to apply when this rule matches (not allowed for deny rules).

Definitions.description: Reusable definitions for paths, sandbox presets, wrappers, and commands.

paths.description: Named path lists referenced by `<path:name>` in sandbox deny rules.

sandbox.description: Named sandbox presets that can be referenced by rules.

wrappers.description: Wrapper command patterns for recursive evaluation (e.g., `sudo <cmd>`).

SandboxPreset.description: Sandbox preset defining filesystem and network restrictions.

FsPolicy.description: Filesystem access policy within a sandbox preset.

writable.description: Directories the sandboxed process is allowed to write to.

deny.description: Paths the sandboxed process is denied access to. Supports `<path:name>` references.

NetworkPolicy.description: Network access policy within a sandbox preset.
